# PantryPal Feature Requests

This document tracks ideas requested by the project owner.

Items are not necessarily scheduled.

---

## High Priority

- Live weekly grocery ads
- Compare prices between local stores
- Intelligent shopping planner
- Receipt scanner
- Barcode scanner
- Pantry consumption tracking
- Better Pantry Score
- Pantry search improvements

---

## Grocery Stores

Support:

- Walmart Pine City
- Walmart Cambridge
- ALDI Pine City
- ALDI Cambridge
- Jerry's Foods North Branch
- Coborn's Pine City
- Costco Coon Rapids
- Costco Woodbury

Future:

- Fleet Farm
- Sam's Club
- Amazon Fresh

---

## Inventory

- Partial quantity tracking
- Consumption history
- Purchase history
- Expiration forecasting
- Multiple pantry locations
- Bulk inventory support
- Freezer inventory (optional)
- Smart staple tracking

---

## Recipes

- AI meal planner
- Weekly meal calendar
- Family favorites
- Pantry-first recipes
- Slow cooker recipes
- Healthy meal mode
- Diabetic-friendly meals

---

## Shopping

- Best price finder
- Shopping trip optimizer
- Price history
- Sale notifications
- Price-per-unit comparison
- Pantry refill recommendations

---

## AI

- Voice assistant
- Ask PantryPal questions
- Shopping recommendations
- Budget predictions
- Consumption predictions

---

## User Experience

- Rustic Rush City cabin theme
- Horizontal log wall background
- Warm wood colors
- Mobile-first design
- Large touch buttons
- ## Shopping Intelligence

- Trip Value Calculator
  - Compare savings vs. extra driving distance.
  - Estimate fuel cost.
  - Estimate additional drive time.
  - Allow the user to set a dollar value for their time.
  - Recommend whether a second or third store is actually worth visiting.
  - Example:
    "Costco saves $31 but adds 42 miles. Worth the trip only if purchasing bulk meat."
- Fast loading
- Offline mode
